title: hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. pseudopantotrichum
intro: Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. pseudopantotrichum, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Hawkweed include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin issues, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Hawkweed include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Hawkweed can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
